modmenu.summaryTranslation.seamlesssleep: Never blink through the night again.
modmenu.descriptionTranslation.seamlesss:
Rethinks the way players sleep:

§8-§r Smooth & Synced animation
§8-§r Visual improvements
§8-§r Minimal server impact

Now available for: §3§lForge§r, §6§lNeoForge§r and §f§lFabric§r!
Discord: gabrielfl4
config.seamlesssleep.title: Seamless Sleep Settings
config.seamlesssleep.sleep.chat_text_opa: Adjusts text transparency while you are in bed.
config.seamlesssleep.sleep.chat_backgrou: Adjusts the dark background transparency while you are in bed.
config.seamlesssleep.client.group.overla: Sleep overlay visibility and vignette intensity while the player is in bed.
config.seamlesssleep.client.group.chat.d: Tweaks for the in-bed chat overlay.
config.seamlesssleep.client.group.camera: Camera tilt and mouse feel while resting and during the sleep skip.
config.seamlesssleep.overlay.enabled.des: Shows or hides the sleep transition text overlay.
config.seamlesssleep.overlay.darkness.de:
Controls the darkness of the sleep vignette.

0 -> NONE || 100 -> MAX
config.seamlesssleep.chat.dim_multiplier:
Overall chat opacity while the player is in bed.

0 -> NONE || 100 -> MAX
config.seamlesssleep.chat.max_lines.desc:
How many chat lines remain visible while sleeping.

Use 0 to hide everything.
config.seamlesssleep.camera.tilt_degrees:
Camera tilt angle while lying down.

Range: 0° - 90°
config.seamlesssleep.camera.mouse_smooth:
Shared bed camera damping strength for resting in bed and the sleep skip animation. It scales both smoothing and the custom reduced mouse response.

0 -> NONE || 100 -> MAX
config.seamlesssleep.misc.debug_logs.des: Shows Seamless Sleep technical logs in the console.
config.seamlesssleep.misc.replay_compati: Adjusts the animation math for compatibility with mods such as ReplayMod and Flashback.
config.seamlesssleep.advanced.notice: Advanced settings. Only change these if you know what they do.
config.seamlesssleep.sleep.clears_weathe:
Chance to clear rain and thunder when sleeping.

0 -> NEVER || 100 -> ALWAYS
§cREQUIRES: /sleep reload
config.seamlesssleep.sleep.duration_mult:
Multiplier that scales the duration of the sleep animation.

§cREQUIRES: /sleep reload
config.seamlesssleep.server.group.accele: Resource acceleration settings used while the sleep skip is active.
OFF disables resource acceleration.
AUTOMATIC uses the governor/autopilot.
MANUAL uses the fixed values chosen by the host.

Shared chunk radius used by nature and process acceleration.
In AUTOMATIC it mirrors the governor ceiling preview.
In MANUAL it becomes editable.

Random tick acceleration speed.
In AUTOMATIC it mirrors the governor ceiling preview.
In MANUAL it becomes editable.

0 -> NONE || 100 -> MAX

Which players define the accelerated area.

SLEEPERS uses only players currently sleeping.
ALL_PLAYERS uses every player in the accelerated dimension.
AUTOMATIC locks this based on Automatic Mode.
Ceiling used by the governor while Acceleration Mode is AUTOMATIC.
Enables safe grass, spreadables and foliage style acceleration.
Enables acceleration for farms, crops and saplings.
Enables kelp as a separate random tick category.
Restricts nature acceleration to vanilla blocks only.
Enables furnace, smoker and blast furnace acceleration.
command.seamlesssleep.reload.created: Config not found. Default created and loaded.
command.seamlesssleep.reload.error: Failed to read config. Defaults loaded.
command.seamlesssleep.reload.synced: All clients synchronized with the server.
command.seamlesssleep.set.sleep_clears_w: Weather Clear Chance is set to %s.
command.seamlesssleep.acceleration.statu: World acceleration status is unavailable right now.
World rate %sx, avg %s MSPT, p95 %s MSPT, governor %s.
Nature -> radius %s/%s, rate %s, extra attempts/section %s, covered chunks %s.
Processes -> radius %s/%s, rate %s, multiplier %sx, covered chunks %s.
command.seamlesssleep.acceleration.gover: AUTO governor bypassed because the current mode is %s.
Governor has no live data right now because world acceleration is inactive.
Inputs -> world rate %sx, avg %s MSPT, p95 %s MSPT, players %s, simulation distance %s, randomTickSpeed %s.
Pressure -> avg %s, p95 %s, perf %s, player risk %s, sim risk %s, rate risk %s, factor %sx, aggressiveness %sx, final %s.
Nature -> action %s, radius %s/%s min %s, rate %s/%s min %s, extra/section %s (%s + frac %s), total/section %s, multiplier %sx, chunks %s.
Processes -> action %s, radius %s/%s min %s, rate %s/%s min %s, multiplier %sx, chunks %s.
command.seamlesssleep.acceleration.rando: Random Tick / Nature acceleration updated to %s.
screen.seamlesssleep.forge_config.notice: Forge does not support custom config menus
screen.seamlesssleep.forge_config.hint: Edit the config file in your config folder for server and client changes.
screen.seamlesssleep.missing_yacl.hint: Install YetAnotherConfigLib v3 to edit configs.
